data.name: severity.info
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] severity.info in blocks-inspections context — status badge for informational inspection messages (e.g., template applied, inspection scheduled). Short noun; sentence case.

data.name: severity.warning
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] severity.warning in blocks-inspections context — status badge for non-blocking inspection concerns (e.g., overdue inspection, missing photo evidence). Short noun; sentence case.

data.name: severity.error
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] severity.error in blocks-inspections context — status badge for blocking inspection failures (e.g., invalid state transition, deficiency record rejected). Short noun; sentence case.

data.name: severity.critical
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] severity.critical in blocks-inspections context — status badge for inspections-integrity-impacting failures (e.g., audit-trail gap on a regulated inspection). Pairs with high-attention visual styling.

data.name: action.save
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] action.save in blocks-inspections context — pilot string for the cluster-B cascade proof. UI button or status label when persisting an inspection record (template, scheduled inspection, deficiency, report). Imperative; sentence case. Trailing U+2026 ellipsis indicates in-progress.

data.name: action.cancel
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] action.cancel in blocks-inspections context — dismiss/abort button on inspection forms and dialogs. Imperative; sentence case.

data.name: action.retry
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] action.retry in blocks-inspections context — retry button after a save, transition, or report-generation failure. Imperative; sentence case.

data.name: state.loading
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] state.loading in blocks-inspections context — empty-state placeholder while fetching inspections data. Trailing U+2026 ellipsis (single character); translators preserve the convention.
